title: Stainless Steel Incinerator Burner, Garden Wood Fire Burning Barrel Cage with Fire Hook, Metal Fire Burning Wood Paper Incinerator Bin For Leaves, Trash, Backyard, Bonfire, Rubbish, Waste(X-Large)
features: Efficient Yard Waste Disposal: The Stainless Steel Incinerator Burner is the perfect solution for effectively burning dead leaves, wood, and paper in your backyard. Say goodbye to yard waste accumulation and keep your outdoor space clean and tidy

Durable and Reliable Construction: Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, this burn cage can withstand temperatures up to 880℃, ensuring long-lasting durability. The smooth and flat surface maintains its color and luster over time, while the bright and lasting gloss adds a touch of elegance to your outdoor area

Optimal Ventilation for Complete Combustion: With its unique air grill design, this incinerator provides excellent convective airflow, allowing for faster and more complete combustion of paper and other materials. Say goodbye to flying ashes and enjoy a cleaner burning experience

Convenient and User-Friendly Design: The side door design of this incinerator allows for easy addition or removal of waste without frequently opening the top cover. The switch on the side door also enables you to control the flame size and the progress of combustion, providing added convenience and flexibility

Enhanced Safety Features: This burn barrel is designed with windproof features to prevent sparks and embers from floating out, reducing the risk of accidental fires. Additionally, the three stable supporting legs ensure safe combustion without tipping over. Enjoy peace of mind while disposing of waste in a secure and controlled manner
description: Features: Its top safety lid controls the flames to prevent any potential accidents or sparks from spreading. The internal bracket can support the burning material so that it has enough oxygen at the bottom to burn completely The hand-welded handle is well insulated to prevent burns to the hands when moving The three support feet at the bottom are not easy to tip over and prevent burns to the ground Specifications: Name: Burn barrels for outside Material: 410 stainless steel Color: Red Size: 35*60CM, 38*66CM，42*66CM Package Includes: 1x Incinerator 1x Fire hook 1x Iron frame Note: 1.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. We guarantee the style is the same as shown in the pictures. 2.Due to the manual measurement and different measurement methods, please allow 1-3cm.
